indexed_user.title: Indexed User
indexed_user.description: Represents an indexed developer/influencer contributing to the Optimum ecosystem on X/Twitter.

verified.description: Whether the user's X account is verified.

followers_count.description: The number of followers on X.

total_views.description: Total views generated on posts containing Optimum keywords.

total_likes.description: Total likes received on posts containing Optimum keywords.

total_posts.description: Total number of posts made containing Optimum keywords.

rank_views.description: The global rank based on total views.

rank_likes.description: The global rank based on total likes.

rank_posts.description: The global rank based on total posts.

badge.description: Custom rank badge: top1, top5, top10, or null.

last_indexed_at.description: The timestamp when the profile stats were last synced.

global_stats.title: Global Stats
global_stats.description: System-wide network stats aggregated across all indexed users.

total_views.description: Sum of views across all indexed users.

total_likes.description: Sum of likes across all indexed users.

total_posts.description: Sum of posts across all indexed users.

/indexed_users/{x_handle}.description: Individual index user documents tracked by the crawler.
